chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 177 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.934/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.935/2020. 19.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Manan, advocate is present alongwith Mr. Zamir Al Khalid, Commissioner (Legal) SRB, and files Vakalatnama on behalf of the applicant, which is taken on record. The order impugnes is dated 28.02.202. The operative part remanded the matter for adjudication afresh. Prima facie the order has not been complied with. The only reason articulated is that this reference has been filed. Perusal of record demonstrates that no urgency application was even filed in more than five years when this reference has remained pending; no notice has ever been sought, however, only on pretext of merely filing of this reference, the impugned order has not been complied with. Such conduct of Sindh Revenue Board appears unbecoming. Let the explanation be filed in the form of sworn affidavit by the Chairman, SRB, which will be placed on file on the next date of hearing. To come up on 03.10.2025. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
